title: Strange error on Iceberg insert
description:
### Describe the bug
This case only happens when the table is on S3.
### How to reproduce
Start MinIO with: `src/tests/docker_scripts/setup_minio.sh stateless`, then create the table with:  [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22471424/spark.py), then in ClickHouse run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, filename = 't0/test/t0', format = 'Parquet');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SETTINGS write_full_path_in_iceberg_metadata = 1 VALUES (1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (2);
--DB::Exception: Manifest list entry at index 1 has null value for field 'added_snapshot_id', but it is required. (ICEBERG_SPECIFICATION_VIOLATION)
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 743. DB::Exception: Manifest list entry at index 1 has null value for field 'added_snapshot_id', but it is required. (ICEBERG_SPECIFICATION_VIOLATION), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x000000002761dbf2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001473e8a9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d22518e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d224b91
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<unsigned long&, char const* const&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<unsigned long&>::type, std::type_identity<char const* const&>::type>, unsigned long&, char const* const&) @ 0x0000000019ef4076
5. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/StatelessMetadataFileGetter.cpp:167: DB::Iceberg::getManifestList(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::weak_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>, DB::Iceberg::PersistentTableComponents const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, String const&, std::shared_ptr<Poco::Logger>)::$_0::operator()() const @ 0x0000000019ef2466
6. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadataFilesCache.h:126: DB::Iceberg::getManifestList(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::weak_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>, DB::Iceberg::PersistentTableComponents const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, String const&, std::shared_ptr<Poco::Logger>) @ 0x0000000019ef1130
7. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:315: DB::IcebergMetadata::updateSnapshot(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, Poco::SharedPtr<Poco::JSON::Object, Poco::ReferenceCounter, Poco::ReleasePolicy<Poco::JSON::Object>>) @ 0x0000000019e4207e
8. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:420: DB::IcebergMetadata::updateState(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, Poco::SharedPtr<Poco::JSON::Object, Poco::ReferenceCounter, Poco::ReleasePolicy<Poco::JSON::Object>>) @ 0x0000000019e3f295
9. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:246: DB::IcebergMetadata::update(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) @ 0x0000000019e40be8
10. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:416: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageS3Configuration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::updateMetadataIfChanged(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000017e11bda
11. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:104: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageS3Configuration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::update(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, bool, bool) @ 0x0000000017e0f35f
12. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorage.cpp:298: DB::StorageObjectStorage::updateExternalDynamicMetadataIfExists(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000019c81360
13. src/Interpreters/InterpreterInsertQuery.cpp:874: DB::InterpreterInsertQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001b808813

18. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x00000000276d4607
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Manifest list entry has null value for added_snapshot_id
